response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with roughly 15 years of professional experience, including recent full-stack TypeScript/Node.js product work, React with MongoDB and AWS CDK at Optilyz, and current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators and agentic tooling) at re:cinq, which directly matches the JD's AI agent development requirement. A strong testing and software-craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, authored test frameworks) fits the quality-focused culture. Gaps are mostly stack-specific: no explicit Nest.js, Kotlin, or Vitest/Jest experience, and much of the frontend history is Ember rather than React, but the breadth and depth suggest fast ramp-up.
strengths: Current AI-agent and MCP tooling experience, a rare and explicitly required skill
Deep full-stack TypeScript/Node.js experience with cloud (AWS CDK), Docker, Kubernetes, and MongoDB
Strong testing culture: TDD practitioner, built test frameworks, taught testing courses
concerns: No explicit Nest.js, Vitest/Jest, or Playwright experience listed
No Kotlin and only limited, dated Java exposure for the secondary backend stack
Frontend history skews toward Ember.js; React experience appears limited to one role

key_factors.factor: Full-stack TypeScript/Node.js depth and years of experience
